about.subtitle: Professionalism and passion
about.title: Experience and care
about.paragraph1: Over 5 years of experience in cosmetology. Individual approach, premium products and modern methods to achieve the perfect result.
about.paragraph2: Each treatment is a unique protocol, developed specifically for your skin type and needs.

contact.subtitle: We are at your service
contact.title: Visit us
contact.description: Our studio is located in the heart of the city

mission.subtitle: Our philosophy
mission.title: We believe that beauty is not only about appearance, but also inner harmony
mission.paragraph1: LumaSkin is a space where modern technology meets individual approach. Each treatment is created especially for you, taking into account your skin's characteristics and your goals.
mission.paragraph2: We use only premium products and proven methods so you can trust us with what's most precious — your health and beauty.

master.subtitle: Studio founder
master.name: Anna Kowalska
master.title: Certified aesthetician
master.paragraph1: For over 5 years I have been helping people gain confidence through skin care. My specialization is deep work with problematic skin and anti-aging programs.
master.paragraph2: I have trained at leading European academies, regularly participate in masterclasses and conferences to stay up to date with the latest advances in cosmetology.
master.quote: For me, every client is a unique story. I don't just perform treatments, I create a path to a better version of yourself.

items.title: Individual approach
items.desc: No two clients are alike. Each program is developed individually for your needs and skin type.

items.title: Premium quality
items.desc: We use only trusted brands and luxury products. No compromises on quality.

items.title: Scientific approach
items.desc: All treatments are based on proven methods and the latest research in cosmetology.

items.title: Trust and care
items.desc: Your comfort and safety are our priority. We create an atmosphere of trust and care.

items.title: Continuous development
items.desc: We regularly train and master new techniques to offer the best.

items.title: Visible result
items.desc: We work for long-term effect, not temporary results. Your skin will thank you.

studio.subtitle: Our space
studio.title: Studio created
studio.paragraph: Every detail at LumaSkin is thought through to the smallest detail. From soft lighting to comfortable temperature — everything is created so you can completely relax.
features: Modern equipment of the latest generation
Sterility and compliance with all safety standards

items.name: Maria K.
items.text: Anna is a true professional! After the cleansing course, my skin transformed. Finally found my master!

items.name: Katarzyna W.
items.text: Very satisfied with the peeling results. Skin became smooth and radiant. Cozy studio, relaxing atmosphere.

items.name: Agnieszka N.
items.text: I've been coming for facial massage for half a year. Visible lifting effect! Anna is always attentive and professional.

items.name: Ewa S.
items.text: Wonderful studio and great master. Individual approach, quality products. I recommend to everyone!

info.title: What to know before your visit

items.title: Preparation
items.desc: Come without makeup or we'll help you remove it. Avoid harsh products the day before treatment.

items.title: Duration
items.desc: Treatments last from 30 to 120 minutes depending on the selected service. Plan your time in advance.

items.title: After treatment
items.desc: We will provide individual care recommendations and schedule your next visit if needed.

items.q: Can I cancel or reschedule my booking?
items.a: Yes, but please let us know at least 24 hours in advance. Contact us by phone or WhatsApp.

items.q: How often should I get treatments?
items.a: It depends on the type of treatment and your skin condition. We will create an individual schedule after consultation.
Yes, some treatments have contraindications. Be sure to inform us about chronic diseases, pregnancy or allergies.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We accept cash, Visa/Mastercard cards and BLIK. Payment is made after the treatment.
